subcodes.first_line: We have adorned the heaven of knowledge with the stars of meaning and utterance. Blessed is he who hath witnessed and perceived, and woe unto [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا زینا سماء العرفان بانجم المعانی و البیان طوبی لمن شهد و رای و ویل
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @chastisement and requital, @proclamation to the people of the world, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
